description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular, box-like structure with a prominent display face. The front panel is a smooth, light-colored surface with a printed message in bold red and black text reading, 'The Time is Nine Minutes to Twelve.' The frame is thick and solid, likely made of metal or plastic, with clean, straight edges and a slightly beveled top. The rear side includes a series of vertical ventilation slits and a large circular cutout, suggesting internal electronics or illumination components. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the board's robust and utilitarian design. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for public information or advertising in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, freestanding advertising board with a bold printed message on a smooth front panel and a thick, light-colored frame. The rear features ventilation slits and a circular cutout, indicating possible internal electronics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main display area with the printed message in red and black text, framed by a thick, light-colored border.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the board's depth and solid, unadorned surface, highlighting the thickness of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying vertical ventilation slits and a large circular cutout, suggesting internal components or access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain, thick side profile of the board.
attribute_frame_design: thick plastic or metal frame with straight edges and slightly beveled top
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed message displaying the time in bold red and black text
